title: User asks for the full list of PO journeys
user_persona: A power user / admin who wants the complete inventory

conversation.user: Give me the full list of every purchase-order activity I can perform in this system.

must_enumerate_information: enumerate all 14 user-facing PO journeys with activity names and descriptions: PoCrt, PoCrtQtn, PoCrtSo, PoCrtTen, PoCopy, PoAmnd, PoApp, PoEdt, PoViw, PoMtn, PoHold, PoScl, PoAcCcUsgMod, PoHlp
explain it changes the Account / Cost-Centre Usage on an existing PO without re-amending the whole document
